ddls:
CREATE TABLE "virus_isolates" (
  "isolate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virus isolate */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number assigned to the isolate */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date and time the isolate was released to the public */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the virus */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the virus */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the virus */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the viral sequence */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of sequence (e.g., GenBank) */,
  "nuc_completeness" TEXT /* Completeness of the nucleotide sequence */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the virus */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Segment of the viral sequence */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location where the isolate was collected */,
  "host" TEXT /* Host organism from which the isolate was obtained */,
  "isolation_source" TEXT /* Source of isolation (e.g., oronasopharynx) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the isolate was collected */,
  "biosample" TEXT /* BioSample ID associated with the isolate */,
  "genbank_title" TEXT /* Title of the GenBank record */,
  "clade" TEXT /* Clade of the virus isolate */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant of the virus isolate */,
  "lineage" TEXT /* Lineage of the virus isolate */,
  "nextstrain_clade" TEXT /* Clade as defined by Nextstrain */,
  "gisaid_accession" TEXT /* GISAID accession number */,
  "is_reference" INTEGER /* Indicates if the isolate is a reference strain */,
  "sequencing_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for sequencing */,
  "sequencing_center" TEXT /* Center where the sequencing was performed */,
  "sequencing_method" TEXT /* Method used for sequencing */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., GenBank, GISAID) */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score for the sequence */,
  "is_recombinant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the isolate is a recombinant */,
  "isolate_status" TEXT /* Status of the isolate (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isolate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "isolate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the virus isolate the author is associated with */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., primary investigator, contributor) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_isolate_id FOREIGN KEY ("isolate_id") REFERENCES virus_isolates ("isolate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "isolate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the virus isolate the publication is associated with */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PubMed ID of the publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the journal */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue of the publication */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., article, review) */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publication is open access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_isolate_id FOREIGN KEY ("isolate_id") REFERENCES virus_isolates ("isolate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institute of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for programmatic access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each virus isolate
Accession number assigned to the isolate
Date and time the isolate was released to the public
Geographic location where the isolate was collected
Host organism from which the isolate was obtained
BioSample ID associated with the isolate
Indicates if the isolate is a reference strain

Indicates if the isolate is a recombinant

Indicates if the publication is open access
